description_long: This is a modern, rectangular desk with a dark wood finish and minimalist design. The desk features a broad, flat top surface supported by two angled side panels, creating a geometric and contemporary look. There is an open shelf or recess beneath the main tabletop, providing space for storage or legroom. The wood grain texture is visible across all surfaces, giving it a natural and elegant appearance. The desk has no visible handles, drawers, or additional attachments, emphasizing its clean lines and simplicity. Its sturdy construction suggests it is suitable for both indoor and semi-public urban environments.
description: A modern, dark wood rectangular desk with angled side supports and an open shelf beneath the tabletop. The design is minimalist and sturdy, with a visible wood grain texture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide tabletop, angled side supports, and a central open shelf beneath the desk.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, uninterrupted wood panel and the desk's rectangular profile.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the open shelf visible beneath the tabletop.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, showing the solid wood panel and rectangular shape.
attribute_orientation: The side with the open shelf beneath the tabletop is intended to face the user, providing legroom and access to the storage space; the solid panels form the sides.
